evidence_summary: Execute a violent power shift through a primal hand-to-hand duel between two leaders on the Martian plains. The sequence must transition from high tension to chaotic violence, concluding with a definitive kill and a change in leadership status.
Dak Kova openly defies Bar Comas. The two leaders engage in a primal, savage hand-to-hand duel. Dak Kova kills Bar Comas with a tusk thrust and claims the title of Jeddak.
Tension $\rightarrow$ Chaos/Violence $\rightarrow$ Shock/Awe.
